decisionLog.summary: Added a rules-first research monitor with source health, metric catalog, and LLM governance boundary.
Agent governance evidence improved, but production write-permission evidence remains insufficient.

holdings.core_question: Can Microsoft become the enterprise authority-control layer for governed agents?
falsifier: Enterprise agents remain draft-only and fail to gain production write permissions.
holdings.name: Microsoft

next_action.question: Look for evidence of Agent 365 production write-permission adoption.
next_action.success_condition: Official disclosure, customer case study, or product documentation shows agents executing governed production actions.

holdings.watch_rule: No fresh evidence on production write-permission adoption.

holdings.core_question: Can Google turn TPU, DeepMind, Cloud, Search, and Workspace into a cost advantage?
falsifier: Search economics weaken while TPU differentiation fails to offset capex pressure.
holdings.name: Alphabet

next_action.question: Check whether TPU and capex advantage appears in Cloud margin or AI revenue quality.
next_action.success_condition: Cloud margin, product disclosure, or customer evidence supports TPU-driven cost leverage.

holdings.watch_rule: Cloud margin fails to show TPU or capex leverage.

holdings.core_question: Can Broadcom keep scaling hyperscaler ASIC and networking exposure?
falsifier: Custom silicon wins do not translate into durable networking or platform pull-through.
holdings.name: Broadcom

next_action.question: Check whether AI semiconductor growth is broadening beyond a small customer set.
next_action.success_condition: Management discloses durable ASIC or networking demand across multiple hyperscalers.

holdings.watch_rule: AI semiconductor growth depends on too few customers.

holdings.core_question: Does leading-edge foundry plus advanced packaging remain the AI silicon chokepoint?
falsifier: Advanced packaging no longer constrains AI silicon supply or margin quality degrades structurally.
holdings.name: TSMC

next_action.question: Review whether advanced packaging and leading-edge demand still support margin quality.
next_action.success_condition: HPC mix, margin, and packaging commentary remain thesis-supportive.

holdings.watch_rule: Overseas fab cost or packaging constraints pressure margin quality.

holdings.core_question: Is NVIDIA still the AI factory operating layer rather than only a GPU vendor?
falsifier: Rubin racks ship, but networking attach, software pull-through, and margins compress sharply.
holdings.name: NVIDIA

next_action.question: Track networking attach, rack-scale platform evidence, and margin durability.
next_action.success_condition: Rubin or Blackwell platform evidence shows durable networking/software pull-through.

holdings.watch_rule: Custom silicon bypass pressure rises without offsetting platform pull-through.

holdings.core_question: Does SK Hynix maintain HBM leadership into the Vera Rubin generation?
falsifier: SK Hynix loses HBM leadership or NVIDIA qualification leverage into Rubin.
holdings.name: SK Hynix

next_action.question: Track HBM qualification and shipment evidence into the Vera Rubin generation.
next_action.success_condition: Company or customer evidence supports continued HBM leadership and shipment leverage.

holdings.watch_rule: Samsung or Micron narrows the HBM qualification and shipment gap.

holdings.core_question: Does data-center power scarcity convert into earnings and contracted growth?
falsifier: Contracted data-center demand fails to overcome grid, regulatory, or interconnection constraints.
holdings.name: Constellation Energy

next_action.question: Track PJM and interconnection conversion from data-center demand into realizable economics.
next_action.success_condition: Regulatory, PJM, or company evidence shows improved path from demand to contracted power economics.

holdings.watch_rule: Interconnection delays prevent power scarcity from reaching realized economics.

holdings.core_question: Does AI data-center power and cooling capex keep translating into orders and backlog?
falsifier: AI data-center capex fails to convert into durable Vertiv orders, backlog, or margins.
holdings.name: Vertiv

next_action.question: Check whether AI power and cooling capex is still visible in orders, backlog, and liquid-cooling commentary.
next_action.success_condition: Orders, backlog, and cooling commentary remain aligned with AI data-center demand.

holdings.watch_rule: Orders or backlog slow while AI capex narratives remain strong.

holdings.core_question: Can MSCI data and risk models become AI workflow verification infrastructure?
falsifier: Trusted data and risk workflows do not become outcome-verification revenue.
holdings.name: MSCI

next_action.question: Look for evidence that MSCI risk and data products are becoming AI workflow verification assets.
next_action.success_condition: Product, retention, or revenue evidence links AI workflow adoption to trusted data demand.

holdings.watch_rule: AI remains a product feature without measurable workflow adoption.

holdings.core_question: Does AI strengthen Moody's credit-risk workflow rather than commoditize it?
falsifier: AI does not improve Moody's analytics or ratings workflow economics.
holdings.name: Moody's

next_action.question: Check whether Moody's AI tools improve analytics workflow adoption or credit-risk research quality.
next_action.success_condition: Analytics growth, retention, or product evidence shows AI-enhanced workflow value.

holdings.watch_rule: AI assistant evidence stays marketing-only while credit cycle weakens.

holdings.core_question: Can Kensho and trusted data embed S&P Global inside LLM workflows?
falsifier: LLM workflow adoption bypasses S&P Global's data and ratings franchises.
holdings.name: S&P Global

next_action.question: Look for Kensho API, MCP, or data-licensing evidence inside LLM workflows.
next_action.success_condition: Product or customer evidence shows trusted S&P data embedded in AI workflows.

holdings.watch_rule: Kensho and trusted-data products do not show workflow integration evidence.

holdings.core_question: Does regulated workflow AI become real production adoption in life sciences?
falsifier: Regulated customers do not adopt Veeva AI in production workflows.
holdings.name: Veeva Systems

next_action.question: Track whether Veeva AI Agents move from roadmap to regulated production workflow usage.
next_action.success_condition: Official rollout, customer, or product evidence shows AI Agents used in regulated workflows.

holdings.watch_rule: AI Agents remain roadmap-only or show low regulated-workflow usage.

holdings.core_question: Is AI semiconductor test strong enough while robotics keeps option value?
falsifier: AI semiconductor-test demand normalizes before robotics optionality can matter.
holdings.name: Teradyne

next_action.question: Check whether semiconductor test demand remains strong enough while robotics option value develops.
next_action.success_condition: Semitest bookings, AI revenue commentary, or robotics deal evidence supports the blended thesis.

top_metrics.name: Robotics revenue and factory automation deals

holdings.watch_rule: Semiconductor test demand digests before robotics becomes material.

holdings.core_question: Does cash still have risk-control option value?
falsifier: Cash no longer provides useful option value against drawdown, valuation, or framework risk.
holdings.name: Cash

next_action.question: Review whether cash still has option value versus current alerts, drawdown, and valuation resets.
next_action.success_condition: Cash remains useful against drawdown, valuation, source-health, or framework uncertainty.

holdings.watch_rule: Cash drag becomes the main portfolio error while thesis evidence remains strong.

principles.red_alert_policy: A red falsifier alert means the thesis must be rewritten or downgraded before any trade decision.

sourceHealth.label: Yahoo Finance via yfinance
sourceHealth.notes: Unofficial research-only price source. Avoid treating it as licensed real-time market data.

sourceHealth.label: Local portfolio calculation
sourceHealth.notes: Calculated from versioned lots, target weights, prices, and FX.

sourceHealth.label: SEC EDGAR APIs and RSS
sourceHealth.notes: Free official source for US issuer filings and XBRL facts.

sourceHealth.label: Company IR and press releases
sourceHealth.notes: Cleanest source for earnings releases, product launches, and management commentary.

sourceHealth.label: FRED macro data
sourceHealth.notes: Good fit for rates, inflation, industrial production, and credit proxies.

sourceHealth.label: News RSS and GDELT-style monitoring
sourceHealth.notes: Useful for event discovery, not for uncited thesis changes.
